markets.rules_primary: If Joey Ortiz records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Miami vs Milwaukee professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 17, 2026 at 7:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Joey Ortiz is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Joey Ortiz starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Joey Ortiz is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Joey Ortiz is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
